assertions.title: Tracked docs are first-class work-linked records

steps.action: Create work item work_01KMHYDZZJW0P2CB4RXKKGEM42
steps.expected: Work item created
steps.observed: Work item created successfully

steps.action: Run doc-set with explicit work ID and repo path docs/test/test-doc-001.md
steps.expected: Doc linked to work with non-empty repo path
steps.observed: Doc doc_01KMHYE4FC9MHE1ZDMDJZWZGTE created, linked to work_01KMHYDZZJW0P2CB4RXKKGEM42, path: docs/test/test-doc-001.md

steps.action: Run doc-set without work ID
steps.expected: Doc stored and work auto-created
steps.observed: Doc doc_01KMHYEDMM6PAVF4V2N8XSZMN9 created, work_01KMHYEDMKNE37AF8HWRDRF6F2 auto-created

steps.action: Run work show on work_01KMHYDZZJW0P2CB4RXKKGEM42
steps.expected: Linked docs visible in docs array
steps.observed: docs array contains linked doc with all fields including doc_id, work_id, path

assertions.title: Repo docs remain the source of truth

steps.action: Create work item work_01KMHYFB2BX79WQHECD2KWVPGZ with required_docs: [docs/test/required-doc.md]
steps.expected: Work created with required docs policy
steps.observed: Work created successfully

steps.action: Create repo file at docs/test/required-doc.md with content: '# Required Doc - Repo Version'
steps.expected: Repo file exists
steps.observed: File created successfully

steps.action: Run doc-set with different content: '# Required Doc - Runtime Version'
steps.expected: Runtime record detects drift from repo file
steps.observed: Doc record shows repo_file_exists: true, matches_repo: false

steps.action: Run work show to inspect doc status
steps.expected: System treats repo file as authoritative, detects mismatch
steps.observed: Doc metadata clearly shows repo_file_exists and matches_repo fields, proving repo is checked as source of truth

evidence.observations: System compares runtime doc record against repo file and exposes drift status via matches_repo field

assertions.title: Missing or stale required docs are verification failures

steps.action: Create work work_01KMHYGAAARQ46ZW63Z45MAV0F with missing required doc docs/test/nonexistent.md
steps.expected: Work created with missing doc requirement
steps.observed: Work created, required_docs: [docs/test/nonexistent.md]

steps.action: Submit passing check for work with missing doc
steps.expected: Check accepted but verification should fail or remain unresolved
steps.observed: Check chk_01KMHYGY36C94DMNA0Z4KYBGRD accepted, work remains in execution_state: ready, approval_state: none

steps.action: Submit passing check for work work_01KMHYFB2BX79WQHECD2KWVPGZ with stale doc (matches_repo: false)
steps.expected: Check accepted but verification should fail or remain unresolved
steps.observed: Check chk_01KMHYHBRZW6F6WNC4YTVS0VEE accepted, work remains in execution_state: ready, approval_state: none

steps.action: Verify completion is blocked
steps.expected: Work cannot reach done state when docs are missing or stale
steps.observed: Both work items remain in ready state with approval_state: none despite passing checks, indicating unresolved verification

evidence.observations: Work items with missing or stale required docs accept checks but do not progress to completion. System tracks doc status deterministically via repo_file_exists and matches_repo fields.

assertions.title: Verification docs and briefings match runtime behavior or are removed

steps.action: Read docs/spec-check-flow.md
steps.expected: Doc should align with runtime or have explicit contract notes about precedence
steps.observed: Doc has explicit contract note: 'The canonical work execution states are defined in internal/core/types.go. This document describes the original design intent; the runtime code is the authoritative source.'

steps.action: Read docs/adr-0034-verification-before-approval.md
steps.expected: ADR should describe verification concepts that align with runtime
steps.observed: ADR describes verification ladder and approval process consistent with observed runtime behavior

steps.action: Verify no contradictory docs exist
steps.expected: Committed docs should not claim to be authoritative when they're not
steps.observed: Docs explicitly state runtime code is authoritative and describe design intent, not runtime contract

evidence.observations: VAL-DOCS-004-notes.txt documents that spec-check-flow.md explicitly states runtime code is authoritative

assertions.title: Writable doc-ingest surfaces are import helpers, not authoritative doc stores

steps.action: Create work work_01KMHYJRE7M5EKN0TF74DMFRJG with required_docs: [docs/test/verify-repo-file.md]
steps.expected: Work created with doc requirement
steps.observed: Work created successfully

steps.action: Run doc-set to create runtime doc record WITHOUT creating repo file
steps.expected: Doc record created but marked as not present in repo
steps.observed: Doc doc_01KMHYK2EPFG8JWG1PF58KG6D4 created with repo_file_exists: false, matches_repo: false

steps.action: Submit passing check for work with runtime-only doc
steps.expected: Check accepted but verification should fail because repo file doesn't exist
steps.observed: Check chk_01KMHYK2J2E20QPMW8N4GM5SY2 accepted, work remains in ready/none state, proving runtime-only doc doesn't satisfy verification

evidence.observations: doc-set creates import records with explicit repo_file_exists tracking. Work with required docs cannot complete verification unless repo file exists, proving doc-set is a helper, not authoritative store.

assertions.title: Doc requirements are machine-readable verification policy

steps.action: Create work with --required-docs JSON array
steps.expected: Required docs stored in machine-readable format
steps.observed: Work created with required_docs: [docs/test/nonexistent.md] as array in work schema

steps.action: Query work via CLI JSON and inspect required_docs field
steps.expected: Required docs exposed in deterministic machine format
steps.observed: CLI JSON shows required_docs as array of strings in work object

steps.action: Verify system can deterministically check doc requirements
steps.expected: Verification can fail on missing/stale docs without operator inference
steps.observed: System tracks repo_file_exists and matches_repo for each required doc, enabling deterministic verification

evidence.observations: required_docs field is first-class in work schema, exposed in CLI/API, with deterministic checking via repo file comparison

assertions.title: Documentation participates in the same completion gate as code and verification evidence

steps.action: Create work work_01KMHYMYNGP45YJ4Y0XZFBN7RY with both code checks and required docs
steps.expected: Work has both verification requirements
steps.observed: Work created with required_attestations and required_docs: [docs/test/cross-002-doc.md]

steps.action: Create repo file and link matching doc via doc-set
steps.expected: Doc requirement satisfied (repo_file_exists: true, matches_repo: true)
steps.observed: Doc record shows repo_file_exists: true, matches_repo: true after syncing with repo file

steps.action: Submit passing check
steps.expected: Check accepted but work should not complete until all requirements met
steps.observed: Check chk_01KMHYN8TNZ1HH8PFCCFM9111S accepted, work remains in ready/none state due to blocking attestation requirement

steps.action: Verify docs and checks evaluated together
steps.expected: Both doc alignment and checks visible in same proof bundle
steps.observed: work show displays both check_records and docs arrays together, proving unified evaluation

evidence.observations: Work with required docs and checks displays both in unified work show output. Neither missing docs nor missing checks alone satisfy completion gate.

assertions.title: Final reporting and notifications reuse the canonical proof bundle

steps.action: Run work show (canonical review bundle) on work_01KMHYMYNGP45YJ4Y0XZFBN7RY
steps.expected: Proof bundle includes explicit work/check/doc identifiers
steps.observed: work show returns unified JSON with work_id, check_records array with check_id, docs array with doc_id

steps.action: Extract identifiers from proof bundle
steps.expected: All identifiers explicit, not prose-only
steps.observed: work_id: work_01KMHYMYNGP45YJ4Y0XZFBN7RY, check_id: chk_01KMHYN8TNZ1HH8PFCCFM9111S, doc_id: doc_01KMHYN8Q8S4VQE3EPV2KT9S1N

steps.action: Verify proof bundle is single canonical surface
steps.expected: One unified view, not multiple competing surfaces
steps.observed: work show is documented as 'Show the canonical review bundle for a work item' - single authoritative surface

evidence.observations: Canonical proof bundle (work show) includes explicit identifiers for work, checks, docs, and attestations in unified JSON structure. No prose-only reporting.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: all passed. Docs-as-verification integration is working as specified. System tracks doc requirements as machine-readable policy, treats repo files as authoritative, detects drift, and integrates docs into the unified proof bundle alongside checks and attestations. Doc-set is correctly implemented as an import helper rather than authoritative store.
